[D1] (14:29-14:37) TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call"

[D2] (16:35-16:60) TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipe.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

export const shouldNotReport = pipe(
  Effect.succeed("Hello"),
  Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
)

export const shouldNotReport2 = Effect.succeed("Hello").pipe(
  Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
)

export const shouldReport =32

export const shouldReportNoArgs = Effect.succeed(32).pipe()


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipe.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

export const shouldNotReport = pipe(
  Effect.succeed("Hello"),
  Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
)

export const shouldNotReport2 = Effect.succeed("Hello").pipe(
  Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
)

export const shouldReport = pipe(32)

export const shouldReportNoArgs = Effect.succeed(32)
